title: Juke's Diner Website Content Placement Map
purpose: Curate approved media assets into conversion-focused website slots without dumping every Drive or social asset publicly.
sourceOfTruth: Hermes Kanban + media hub approval status
globalRules: Only use assets with status=approved or explicit John/brand-lead approval for public website placement.
Prefer a small number of high-converting visuals over galleries that slow the site or dilute booking CTAs.
Do not publish private docs, raw Drive folders, customer/vendor PII, unapproved minors, license plates, payment info, or behind-the-scenes mess without approval.
Every public asset should support one of three outcomes: book catering/private events, trust the truck, or crave the food.
If an asset is useful but not website-grade, keep it in social/Metricool repurposing or internal brand-board use instead.

slots.label: Hero
slots.idealAssetType: One polished horizontal truck or food-truck-at-event photo; optional 5-8 second silent loop only if optimized.
approvalCriteria: Instantly communicates Nashville food truck + retro diner energy.
Clean enough for first impression: no cluttered background, private addresses, unreadable signage, or operational mess.
Subject leaves room for headline and Book the Truck CTA on mobile and desktop.
Compressed web derivative exists; original can remain in Drive/media hub.
slots.fallbackCopy: Smash burgers, hot chicken, waffle wheels, and a full event truck experience — served fast, loud, clean, and memorable.
slots.updateCadence: Review monthly; update only when a clearly stronger hero asset is approved or season/event positioning changes.
slots.doNotUse: Do not rotate random Drive uploads into the hero. Hero changes need explicit brand approval.

slots.label: Menu highlights
slots.idealAssetType: Tight food photos: burgers, hot chicken, fries, waffle wheels, sauces, trays; horizontal or square crops.
approvalCriteria: Food is sharp, appetizing, well-lit, and matches what customers can actually order.
No misleading portions, unavailable specials, messy packaging, or inconsistent menu names.
Alt text and menu item mapping are clear before publishing.
slots.fallbackCopy: Fan favorites built for lunch rushes, events, and late-night cravings.
slots.updateCadence: Quarterly menu review; immediately update when menu items, pricing, or seasonal specials change.
slots.doNotUse: Do not publish experimental food shots unless John approves the item as customer-facing.

slots.label: Catering/private events
slots.idealAssetType: Event setup photos, packed lines, serving windows, tray spreads, private party context, short recap clips.
approvalCriteria: Shows reliable service and clean setup before showing crowd chaos.
No customer faces unless permission is documented or faces are not identifiable.
Asset can be paired with event type, service style, and clear inquiry CTA.
Any client logos, venue names, or private locations are approved for public use.
slots.fallbackCopy: Bring Juke's to corporate lunches, festivals, weddings, late-night drops, and private parties.
slots.updateCadence: Refresh after every approved high-quality event recap; otherwise monthly.
slots.doNotUse: Do not expose contract terms, invoices, guest lists, private addresses, or raw planning docs.

slots.label: Truck
slots.idealAssetType: Clean exterior truck shots, service-window shots, parked-at-venue proof, route/location graphics.
approvalCriteria: Truck is clean, branded, and positioned as reliable/mobile/event-ready.
No license plates, private property, permit-sensitive details, or accidental people in compromising context.
Works as a trust-builder near Find Us or Book the Truck CTAs.
slots.fallbackCopy: The Juke's truck rolls into Nashville events with a diner-style setup built for speed and service.
slots.updateCadence: Monthly route/season check; replace when wrap, equipment, or service setup materially changes.
slots.doNotUse: Do not use repair, breakdown, messy prep, or off-brand parking-lot shots publicly.

slots.label: Staff/story
slots.idealAssetType: Founder/operator photos, prep process, team service moments, training/system snapshots approved for public story.
approvalCriteria: People shown have permission and are represented respectfully.
Story supports trust, operator discipline, or franchise-readiness — not vanity content.
No confidential SOPs, dashboard data, financials, or employee/customer PII visible.
slots.fallbackCopy: Juke's is built by operators who care about fast service, clean systems, and food people remember.
slots.updateCadence: Quarterly or after major team/franchise milestones.
slots.doNotUse: Do not post internal dashboards, sensitive SOPs, private Slack, or unapproved employee images.

slots.label: Dining room/social proof
slots.idealAssetType: Busy-but-clean service photos, customer reactions with permission, testimonials, review cards, line/crowd proof.
approvalCriteria: Shows demand and trust without making service look chaotic or slow.
Testimonials/reviews are attributable only where terms permit; otherwise quote as anonymized snippets.
Faces, minors, and venue/customer names are approved or obscured.
slots.fallbackCopy: Built for the rush: memorable food, fast handoff, and a setup guests notice.
slots.updateCadence: Monthly; add strongest new proof from approved events and reviews.
slots.doNotUse: Do not use screenshots of private messages or reviews if platform terms or customer privacy are unclear.

slots.label: Instagram/TikTok embeds or gallery
slots.idealAssetType: Approved top-performing embeds, a 6-9 item curated gallery, or static thumbnails linking to social profiles.
approvalCriteria: Embed/gallery content is curated and fast-loading; no endless feeds or unmoderated account dumps.
Posts support food proof, event trust, or booking intent.
Captions/comments shown by third-party embeds are brand-safe at the time of review.
Fallback static images exist if embeds hurt performance or privacy.
slots.fallbackCopy: See what Juke's is cooking, where the truck is rolling, and what the team is building next.
slots.updateCadence: Biweekly during active campaigns; monthly otherwise.
slots.doNotUse: Do not auto-embed every social post or rely on third-party feeds as the only proof block.

slots.label: Press/reviews
slots.idealAssetType: Press logos, review snippets, ratings screenshots where allowed, event organizer quotes, media mentions.
approvalCriteria: Quote/source is accurate, current, and allowed to be reused.
No fake scarcity, inflated numbers, or unverifiable claims.
Press/review block sits near booking CTA to reduce buyer hesitation.
slots.fallbackCopy: Trusted for events, rushes, and Nashville food-truck moments that need to run smoothly.
slots.updateCadence: Monthly review; update within 72 hours of a meaningful new press/review win.
slots.doNotUse: Do not crop or quote reviews in a way that changes meaning.

slots.label: Seasonal campaigns
slots.idealAssetType: Limited-time menu shots, holiday/event graphics, festival recap photos, campaign-specific truck/food visuals.
approvalCriteria: Campaign dates, menu availability, pricing, and event details are confirmed before publishing.
Asset has a removal date or expiration note so stale campaigns do not linger.
CTA points to the right action: book, find us, order, or follow.
slots.fallbackCopy: Seasonal specials and event runs appear here when they are live and confirmed.
slots.updateCadence: Before campaign launch, mid-campaign check, and removal within 24 hours after end date.
slots.doNotUse: Do not leave expired holiday, festival, or limited-time offer graphics on primary pages.
